title: Arabidopsis growth medium with varying sulfur and nitrogen content

steps: %s %s General media recipe Volume Minor salts (100x) 10 mL Major slats (10x) 100 mL Ferrous solution (100x) 10 mL Vitamin mix (1000x, Murashige and Skkog) 1 mL water to 1L adjust pH to 5.8 with 1M KOH divide 1L to 2x 500 mL (into 1L bottles) add 4g agar (Remel) per 500mL autoclave use 50mL per square plate
%s %s Concentration of Sulphate in +S: 1.68 mM in -S: 0.015 mM Concentration of Nitrate in +N: 3 mM in -N: 0.3 mM
%s %s Media solution stock solutions +S/+N A+C+G +S/-N A+D+G -S/+N B+E+H -S/-N B+F+H media recipes.xlsx
